zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Clifton於1353年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩爾維其可時，他的父親Sir Nicholas de Clifton23歲，母親Eleanor West20歲。他於大約1377年與Anne Fenwick結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1382年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年29歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Clifton于1353年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩爾維其可时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas de Clifton23岁，母亲Eleanor West20岁。他于大约1377年与Anne Fenwick结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1382年在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Clifton was born in 1353, in Salwick, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Nicholas de Clifton, was 23 and his mother, Eleanor West, was 20. He married Anne Fenwick about 1377. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1382, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Clifton est né en 1353, à Salwick, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Nicholas de Clifton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Eleanor West, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Anne Fenwick environ 1377. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1382, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Clifton 1353 in Salwick, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas de Clifton 23 und seine Mutter Eleanor West 20. Er hat um 1377 Anne Fenwick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1382 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Clifton è nato il nel 1353 nel Salwick, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas de Clifton, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor West, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Anne Fenwick circa 1377. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1382, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Clifton(이)가 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 살윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas de Clifton(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor West(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1377년 Anne Fenwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1382년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Clifton родился в 1353 г. в местности салвикк, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas de Clifton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor West, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Fenwick около 1377 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1382 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Clifton nació en 1353, en Salwick, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Nicholas de Clifton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Eleanor West, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Anne Fenwick aproximadamente 1377. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1382, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
